element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core tool for close-range combat; can deflect projectiles when positioned correctly
Mid-range weapon; upgradeable but lost on death; primary ranged option before special items
Defeated through combination of katana and shuriken; each castle escalates variety
Optional collection; rewards exploration without combat risk
Conditional reveal of hidden power-ups; teaches environment interaction
More powerful than shurikens; limited supply forces strategic use
Heavy damage to all on-screen enemies; rarest power-up; reserved for bosses/dense encounters
Brief invulnerability; used for escape or boss windows

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Innermost region of each of 4 castles
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Defeated to obtain four gems; escalating difficulty across Aosame, Akasame, Ryokusame, Momosame
Inhabits stone Murasame statue; requires all four gems collected from prior lords
Rescue grants additional lives; creates secondary objectives alongside combat progression

element_introduction_order.first_appears: After first half completion of each level
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Opportunity to gain extra lives; reward for checkpoint achievement

typical_relief_triggers: Bonus rounds after first half of level
Reaching checkpoint between path and castle interior
typical_tension_triggers: Dense enemy encounters in castle paths
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced with escalating difficulty; relentless enemy pressure punctuated by relief objectives (princess rescues, bonus rounds); time limit creates constant tension backdrop

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Scrolls scattered throughout; raccoon suits reveal hidden power-ups (discovery-based optional content)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Learning phase; basic katana/shuriken combat against samurai and ninja; introduces movement in top-down view; limited enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy variety (introduction of hannya); castle interiors grow larger; power-up scarcity forces skill reliance; princess rescue objectives add complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dense enemy encounters; powerful castle lords with distinct patterns; special weapons essential but limited; Murasame Castle requires all four gems and mastery of all combat mechanics
notable_spikes: Transition from path to castle interior (enemy density increase)
Each castle lord encounter (pattern learning required)
Final Murasame Castle stage (alien entity boss)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of four main castles divided into path section and castle interior; path emphasizes exploration and enemies, interior emphasizes progression toward boss and power-up economy
Four gems obtained sequentially from four castle lords (Aosame, Akasame, Ryokusame, Momosame); required to access final Murasame Castle; forces linear progression with escalating difficulty
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All four main castles feed final stage

notable_level_patterns.description: Multiple princesses hidden in castle interiors; rescue grants extra lives; creates incentive for thorough exploration within combat-focused progression
Bonus round after first half completion provides relief valve; extra life opportunity breaks tension and marks progression milestone
